languages.text: Даргонус осажден войсками Инквизиции. Себериан фон Валанциус, который должен был быть мертв уже не одно столетие, казнен мгновение назад. Необходимо разобраться, что происходит.

traits.locale_text: Даргонус осажден войсками Инквизиции. Себериан фон Валанциус, который должен был быть мертв уже не одно столетие, казнен мгновение назад. Необходимо разобраться, что происходит.

languages.text: Dargonus is besieged by the forces of the Inquisition. Seberian von Valancius, a man who should have been dead for centuries, was executed mere moments ago. The truth of what is happening must be discovered.
languages.original_text: Даргонус осажден войсками Инквизиции. Себериан фон Валанциус, который должен был быть мертв уже не одно столетие, казнен мгновение назад. Необходимо разобраться, что происходит.

traits.locale_text: Dargonus is besieged by the forces of the Inquisition. Seberian von Valancius, a man who should have been dead for centuries, was executed mere moments ago. The truth of what is unfolding must be uncovered.

Dargonus is besieged by the forces of the Inquisition. Seberian von Valancius, a man who should have been dead for centuries, was executed mere moments ago. The truth of what is unfolding must be uncovered.

Dargonus is besieged by the forces of the Inquisition. Seberian von Valancius, a man who should have been dead for centuries, was executed mere moments ago. The truth of what is happening must be discovered.

Dargonus is besieged by the forces of the Inquisition. Seberian von Valancius, a man who should have been dead for centuries, was executed mere moments ago. The truth of what is happening must be discovered.

languages.text: "Dargonus wird von den Truppen der Inquisition belagert. Seberian von Valancius, ein Mann, der seit Jahrhunderten tot sein müsste, wurde vor wenigen Augenblicken exekutiert. Es gilt, die Wahrheit herauszufinden.
languages.original_text: Dargonus is besieged by the forces of the Inquisition. Seberian von Valancius, a man who should have been dead for centuries, was executed mere moments ago. The truth of what is happening must be discovered.

traits.locale_text: "Dargonus wird von den Truppen der Inquisition belagert. Seberian von Valancius, ein Mann, der seit Jahrhunderten tot sein müsste, wurde vor wenigen Augenblicken exekutiert. Es gilt, die Wahrheit herauszufinden.

languages.text: Dargonus est assiégée par les forces de l'Inquisition. Seberian von Valancius, un homme censé être mort depuis des siècles, vient tout juste d'être exécuté. Il est impératif de découvrir la vérité sur les événements.
languages.original_text: Dargonus is besieged by the forces of the Inquisition. Seberian von Valancius, a man who should have been dead for centuries, was executed mere moments ago. The truth of what is happening must be discovered.

traits.locale_text: Dargonus est assiégée par les forces de l'Inquisition. Seberian von Valancius, un homme censé être mort depuis des siècles, vient tout juste d'être exécuté. Il est impératif de découvrir la vérité sur les événements.

languages.text: 达戈努斯正遭受审判庭军队的围攻。本该死去数百年的塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯，竟在不久前刚被处决。必须查明这一切背后的真相。
languages.original_text: Dargonus is besieged by the forces of the Inquisition. Seberian von Valancius, a man who should have been dead for centuries, was executed mere moments ago. The truth of what is happening must be discovered.

traits.locale_text: 达戈努斯正遭受审判庭军队的围攻。本该死去数百年的塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯，竟在不久前刚被处决。必须查明这一切背后的真相。

languages.text: Dargonus está siendo asediado por las fuerzas de la Inquisición. Seberian von Valancius, un hombre que debería llevar siglos muerto, ha sido ejecutado hace unos momentos. Es preciso averiguar qué está pasando.
languages.original_text: Dargonus is besieged by the forces of the Inquisition. Seberian von Valancius, a man who should have been dead for centuries, was executed mere moments ago. The truth of what is happening must be discovered.

traits.locale_text: Dargonus está siendo asediado por las fuerzas de la Inquisición. Seberian von Valancius, un hombre que debería llevar siglos muerto, ha sido ejecutado hace unos momentos. Es preciso averiguar qué está pasando.

languages.text: ダーゴヌスは異端審問の軍勢に包囲されている。何世紀も前に死んだはずのセベリアン・フォン・ヴァランシウスが、ついさっき処刑された。何が起きているのか、整理しなければならない。
languages.original_text: Dargonus is besieged by the forces of the Inquisition. Seberian von Valancius, who should have been dead for centuries, was executed moments ago. What is happening must be sorted out.

languages.text: Dargonus, Engizisyon güçlerinin kuşatması altında. Yüzyıllar önce ölmüş olması gereken Seberian von Valancius, daha birkaç dakika önce idam edildi. Neler olup bittiğinin gerçeği ortaya çıkarılmalı.
languages.original_text: Dargonus is besieged by the forces of the Inquisition. Seberian von Valancius, a man who should have been dead for centuries, was executed mere moments ago. The truth of what is happening must be discovered.

traits.locale_text: Dargonus, Engizisyon güçlerinin kuşatması altında. Yüzyıllar önce ölmüş olması gereken Seberian von Valancius, daha birkaç dakika önce idam edildi. Neler olup bittiğinin gerçeği ortaya çıkarılmalı.
